summary: Repo-wide sweep: 4 more legacy Rails form routes (/shelf/move_batch, /shelf/move_batch/:user_id, PUT /notes/:book_id/share, POST /notes/:book_id/:annotation_pair_id/note) now flatten the stdin JSON map into application/x-www-form-urlencoded fields via PostFormWithParams/PutFormWithParams instead of sending an ignored JSON body.
reason: Same JSON-to-Rails-form bug class as the review create-update finding. The route research documents these as form/page-source routes with a CSRF requirement. /notifications/track and import (generic JSONL) were intentionally left as JSON — no form contract documented for either.
validated_outcome: --dry-run shows shelf create-movebatch POST body 'shelf_order=3%2C1%2C2' and notes share update PUT body 'visible=1' as form-encoded.
